Track Record

34+ Projects.
Real Results.

From hospitals and universities to military facilities, oil companies, and foreign consulates — TECIL Solar has a documented delivery history that speaks for itself. Every project is commissioned, tested, and handed over with full documentation.

Project Portfolio

Documented projects from 2014 to present. Residential and SME installations not listed for client privacy.

Company History

16 Years of Consistent Delivery

TECIL Solar didn't build its reputation in a day. Here's the journey from a single operation in Calabar to a 7-branch national solar authority.

2008
TECIL Integrated Services Limited founded
2014
First documented institutional projects completed
2016
₦27.5M solar street light project for Cross River Basin Authority
2018
₦48M off-grid solar system — Biase Plantations (Wilmar)
2019
Expanded to Uyo; delivered for Nigerian Navy & HIIT PLC
2020
Projects for UCTH, Eastern Naval Command, two universities
2022
₦40M+ Uddyking Oil projects; Unical Microfinance Bank HQ
2024
Reached 7 operational branches across 5 states
2026
EaaS and Training Institute development underway
Credentials

Procurement-Ready. Fully Documented.

For institutions, government agencies, and corporate clients, TECIL Solar provides complete project documentation — from site assessment and BOQ through commissioning reports and handover certificates.

Renaissance University, Enugu

Unical Microfinance Bank
